Headline: #54B South Cicero Temporary Reroute at Cicero/39th
ShortDescription: 54B South Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Cicero/39th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#54B South Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cicero, Pershing, Central, 47th, Cicero over over normal route due, to street blockage near Cicero/39th.

Allow extra travel time.
